allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./public/standard/standards_middle.json','utf8'\)\); const seen=new Map\(\); for\(const s of d.standards\){ if\(!seen.has\(s.subject_group\)\) seen.set\(s.subject_group,s.order\); } const sorted=[...seen.entries\(\)].sort\(\(a,b\)=>a[1]-b[1]\); console.log\(sorted.map\(x=>x[0]\)\);")
